title: stevia pohliana
intro: Stevia pohliana is a plant species within the Stevia genus, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), which is native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Stevia pohliana include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stevia pohliana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Stevia pohliana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which may be used to support various health benefits, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
